decisionScope: Development-baseline continuation after SUB-66 AI approval, merge, and clean post-merge verification; not Journey 11 completion or staging/production promotion.

auditSnapshot.statusPolicy: Preserve every historical Done status; replace claims through linked remediation evidence.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Runnable POC architecture, authentication, RBAC, and evidence foundation
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Recovery architecture, canonical authorization, contracts, ownership, provenance, and hermetic CI replace the provisional parent exit claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Evidence ingestion and traceable draft assembly
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Canonical scope, shared contracts, module ownership, provenance, web modules, and reproduction evidence replace the provisional parent exit claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Configuration and deterministic validation
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Executable contracts, governed configuration, modular UI, and deterministic replay replace the provisional parent exit claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Scaffold the runnable Docker Compose POC runtime
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: One modular-monolith API, worker, web, PostgreSQL, and MinIO now pass pinned two-pass clean Compose certification.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Define the canonical role-based POC demo journey
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Journey 11 now includes governed configuration, immutable snapshots, reproducibility manifests, server contract context, and CI preconditions.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Create the complete synthetic demo fixture pack
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Positive closed synthetic catalogs, reserved domains, deterministic binary generation, and clean reset replace a legacy denylist claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Model synthetic agency and NGO organization boundaries
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Canonical contract ownership, administrator/auditor assignments, submitted visibility, and server-issued contract contexts replace caller-derived scope.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Implement seeded login, logout, identity UI, and server-side RBAC
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Canonical assignment-backed authorization and five identity-bearing role workspaces replace the provisional RBAC completion claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Model versioned POC reimbursement configuration
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Executable configuration contracts, full lifecycle evidence, and content-addressed validation/package inputs replace mutable active-state assumptions.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Store immutable uploaded and generated artifacts with hashes
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Capability-owned artifact statements, immutable snapshot references, integrity reads, and reproduction hashes replace the provisional artifact claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Record append-only events and field lineage for audit
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Versioned envelopes, typed relations, immutable references, corrected expense-date lineage, and revision chains replace incomplete events/lineage.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Import ledger rows with source-row lineage and reconciled totals
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Typed field/source contracts, corrected lineage, and modular ingestion projections retain the ledger import behavior under current boundaries.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Upload ledger and evidence with real processing status
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Canonical scope, capability statements, worker boundary, transport errors, and ingestion feature ownership replace the provisional upload/job claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Run one real OCR/LLM extraction adapter
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Versioned draft-only extraction contracts, immutable component provenance, and replay-bound model/parser identifiers replace the provisional adapter claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Review and correct proposed extraction with provenance
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Append-only same-field correction lineage and feature-owned human review preserve AI draft-only authority.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Assemble an evidence-linked draft invoice
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Shared mapping contracts, exact invoice snapshots, typed derivation/mapping relations, and hashed validation inputs replace loose draft linkage.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Configure and activate rules through a small admin UI
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: The administrator workspace now executes test, approve, activate, supersede, retire, and rollback against server authority.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Resolve blockers and explain or dismiss configured warnings
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Governed rule versions, validation feature ownership, and exact deterministic replay replace a live-state-only finding claim.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Execute reproducible deterministic validation rules
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Rules execute from shared contracts against immutable input manifests and reproduce exact results.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Calculate deterministic category and total budget availability
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Typed decimal/rule contracts and validation-input manifests preserve deterministic budget calculations.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Require NGO Approver review and attestation
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Canonical role enforcement, attestation snapshot/version references, and NGO Approver workspace preserve human authority.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Generate a real immutable invoice package
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Exact invoice snapshots and template/renderer reproduction manifests now prove deterministic package files and archive bytes.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Submit an immutable invoice version to the government queue
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Canonical authority, immutable submission snapshots/relations, reproducible package identity, and role workspace replace provisional submission evidence.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Show submitted and resubmitted packages in the government queue
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Submitted-only agency scope, immutable version projections, and Government Reviewer workspace replace client-derived queue claims.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Establish a reviewable legacy baseline and restore GitHub delivery
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: The only mixed legacy import exception is isolated and reviewable.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Enforce issue-branch, PR, review, merge, and evidence discipline
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Issue isolation and durable evidence remain; the blanket human/fresh-context review rule was replaced by SUB-69.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Amend the ADR and architecture for an enforceable modular monolith
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Six layers, nine capability owners, dependency rules, and ontology/configuration split are machine checked.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Repair tenant authorization and auditor scoping
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Canonical ownership, explicit assignments, submitted auditor visibility, and zero-mutation denials are executable.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Implement executable ontology and shared contracts
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Four registries, generated consumers, compatibility rules, and drift tests form an executable ontology.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Enforce module ownership and capability-owned persistence
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Physical layers, repository ports, named statements, table owners, and forbidden-import tests enforce the modular monolith.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Govern the complete configuration lifecycle
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Draft through retirement, immutable tests, human approval, prospective activation, supersession, and rollback are executable.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Correct provenance, relations, and immutable invoice snapshots
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Versioned events, eight relation types, immutable stage snapshots, and v1/v2 lineage are executable.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Decompose the web application and consume shared contracts
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Feature modules, five role workspaces, canonical contract DTOs, stale-projection guards, and demo boundaries are executable.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Establish hermetic CI and durable evidence manifests
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Pinned static checks, two fresh-state Compose passes, retained hashes, and required hosted certification are executable.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Make validation and package generation fully reproducible
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Content-addressed validation/package manifests reproduce exact results, files, archives, and changed-input traces.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Make AI review and executable certification the code-review gate
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Immutable-diff AI review plus issue-proportionate executable evidence replaces a universal human code-review ceremony.

historicalDoneAudit.title: Produce a brand-neutral, privacy-safe public repository candidate
historicalDoneAudit.currentCoverage: Positive synthetic data and an allowlisted history-free export remain valid; they do not certify the now-public durable repository itself.

invalidatedClaims.claim: A pre-recovery Linear Done state alone proves the original acceptance criteria and release quality.
invalidatedClaims.reason: Legacy work was imported in mixed commits without issue-isolated PR, immutable AI review, durable manifest, or clean post-merge proof.

invalidatedClaims.claim: The legacy API and package layout already enforced the proposed ontology and modular-monolith boundaries.
invalidatedClaims.reason: Placeholder packages, cross-capability SQL, and physical layer bypasses existed at the legacy baseline.

invalidatedClaims.claim: Legacy role checks and organization filters were sufficient tenant authorization evidence.
invalidatedClaims.reason: Canonical ownership, administrator/auditor assignments, indirect-reference denial, and mutation fingerprints were missing.

invalidatedClaims.claim: A mutable active flag was adequate configuration governance.
invalidatedClaims.reason: Immutable test evidence, distinct human approval, supersession, retirement, rollback, and prospective activation were absent.

invalidatedClaims.claim: Legacy events, lineage, validation runs, and packages were sufficient for historical reconstruction and deterministic replay.
invalidatedClaims.reason: Event envelopes, typed relations, exact invoice snapshots, correction chains, and reproduction manifests were incomplete.

invalidatedClaims.claim: SUB-58 required a fresh-context or human code review for every high-risk change.
invalidatedClaims.reason: The requirement was an unintended ceremony and was explicitly replaced by immutable-diff AI review plus executable certification.

invalidatedClaims.claim: SUB-79's history-free candidate certification describes the repository currently visible at github.com/rodrigogreising/ContractView.
invalidatedClaims.reason: The owner changed the durable repository itself to PUBLIC on 2026-07-12; it intentionally contains Git history, SDLC evidence, PR/Linear links, and owner metadata excluded from the candidate.

exceptions.risk: Journey 11 has not yet been executed as the final recorded browser certification.
exceptions.compensatingControl: Two-pass clean Compose regression, immutable recovery evidence, and all non-negotiable boundaries remain required before the dependent journey work starts.
exceptions.targetResolution: Complete SUB-55 after the four continuation issues execute in dependency order.
exceptions.pocImpact: Blocks final POC/release certification, but not return to Build for the explicitly blocked continuation issues.

exceptions.risk: The public durable repository exposes Git author history, SDLC/control-plane references, PR/Linear URLs, and owner identity that the history-free SUB-79 candidate excluded; GitHub reports repository secret scanning disabled.
exceptions.compensatingControl: The owner explicitly changed visibility; runtime data remains positive-contract synthetic, a current-tree high-confidence pattern scan found no secret shapes outside scanner fixtures, and the repository remains all-rights-reserved.
exceptions.targetResolution: Enable GitHub secret scanning; before open-source licensing or any claim of history-free/privacy-neutral publication, publish the certified allowlisted candidate or separately certify the full-history disclosure surface.
exceptions.pocImpact: Accepted disclosure exception; does not weaken runtime tenant, provenance, deterministic, or human-authority controls.

exceptions.risk: MFA/SSO, malware scanning, hosted retention/deletion/legal hold, backup/DR, penetration testing, and real-data controls are not implemented.
exceptions.compensatingControl: The certified scope is local, synthetic, non-production, and cannot promote a build to staging or production.
exceptions.targetResolution: Resolve before hosted real-data use or staging/production promotion.
exceptions.pocImpact: No impact on the bounded synthetic engineering POC.

exceptions.risk: GitHub reports Node.js 20 action-runtime deprecation while the repository application toolchain remains pinned to Node 20.20.2.
exceptions.compensatingControl: GitHub currently forces affected official actions onto Node 24 and the required certification passes; the application build continues under its declared Node pin.
exceptions.targetResolution: Update pinned official action revisions/toolchain policy before GitHub removes compatibility.
exceptions.pocImpact: Non-blocking maintenance risk; no failed certification or runtime behavior change.

exceptions.risk: The real OCR adapter evaluation covers one narrow synthetic document class and is not evidence of broad extraction accuracy.
exceptions.compensatingControl: AI produces draft fields only, all outputs require human review, deterministic rules own validation, and provider/model/prompt/parser versions are retained.
exceptions.targetResolution: Add representative evaluation and privacy review before expanding document classes or using real data.
exceptions.pocImpact: Acceptable for the single supported Journey 11 fixture.

continuationGate.postMergeAction: Remove SUB-66 blocker relations, return the project to Build, and select the next dependency-ready leaf from current origin/master.

humanApprovalRequirement.basis: Executable evidence and immutable AI review certify development integration; real release promotion remains an explicit human authority decision.
